hero.description: We build fast, scalable and conversion-focused online stores tailored to your brand.

whatIs.label: Is This Page For You?
whatIs.title: You Have a Product. Customers Are Waiting.
whatIs.paragraph1: Whether you have a physical store, a handmade product, or just an idea — with the right infrastructure, selling online is easier and more profitable than ever.
whatIs.paragraph2: Your customers are searching for you on Google, discovering you on social media and wanting to place orders online. Do you have a professional digital store ready to receive them?
whatIs.paragraph3: At Sybor Digital, we don't just put you online — we build an e-commerce experience that converts visitors, builds brand trust and is ready to scale.

physical.title: I have a physical store
physical.description: I want to go online and bring my store to the digital world.

startup.title: I'm starting a new brand
startup.description: I want to launch an e-commerce site from scratch.

growing.title: My current site isn't working
growing.description: My sales are low and I need a better performing store.

global.title: I want to sell internationally
global.description: I want a multi-language store that reaches customers worldwide.

whatWeDo.label: What We Do
whatWeDo.title: End-to-End E-Commerce Solutions
whatWeDo.paragraph1: We're with you from concept to launch. We manage the entire process — from design and development to payment integration and SEO optimization.
whatWeDo.paragraph2: We customize platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce, or build a fully custom e-commerce infrastructure tailored to your needs. In both cases, our priority is speed, security and conversion.
whatWeDo.paragraph3: We don't stop after launch. We stay by your side with analytics tracking, performance optimization and technical support as your business grows.
whatWeDo.cardTitle: A Complete Solution Under One Roof
whatWeDo.cardDescription: Everything your e-commerce project needs — from a single team.

whyUs.label: Why Sybor Digital?
whyUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyUs.subtitle: Boutique approach, corporate discipline. A team that genuinely adds value to your project.

reason1.title: Results-Driven Approach
reason1.description: We build sites that sell, not just look good. Every design and development decision is made with conversion in mind.

reason2.title: Transparent Process
reason2.description: You're informed at every stage of your project. No surprise costs, no delays, no ambiguity.

reason3.title: Fast Delivery
reason3.description: Without the bureaucratic slowness of large agencies, we deliver fast without compromising on quality.

reason4.title: Technical Excellence
reason4.description: We build fast, secure and scalable systems using Next.js, Node.js and modern infrastructure.

reason5.title: Post-Launch Support
reason5.description: Our relationship doesn't end at delivery. We stay with you for technical support, updates and growth.

reason6.title: Real Partnership
reason6.description: We don't just write code — we understand your business, contribute to your digital strategy and think long-term.

features.label: Service Details
features.title: What We Offer
features.subtitle: Everything you need for a complete e-commerce solution

custom.title: Custom E-Commerce Software
custom.description: Fully custom-built e-commerce platforms tailored to your needs. Complete control and flexibility.

payment.title: Payment System Integration
payment.description: iyzico, PayTR, Stripe and more. Fast and secure payment infrastructure setup.

mobile.title: Mobile-Responsive Design
mobile.description: Flawless appearance on all devices. Mobile-first, fully responsive design approach.

stock.title: Stock & Order Management
stock.description: Advanced admin panel for inventory tracking, order management and logistics integrations.

seo.title: SEO & Speed Optimization
seo.description: Google Core Web Vitals compliant, ultra-fast loading and search engine optimization.

admin.title: Admin Panel & Reporting
admin.description: Detailed analytics reports, sales charts and customer behavior analysis.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: We bring your project to life with a transparent and effective process from start to finish.

discovery.title: Discovery & Planning
discovery.description: We analyze your needs, target audience and competitors. We create a clear roadmap and technical architecture before writing a single line of code.

design.title: Design & Prototype
design.description: We craft wireframes and high-fidelity UI designs with user experience at the core. We never move forward without your approval.

development.title: Development & Testing
development.description: We write clean, scalable code using modern technologies. Performance, security and compatibility tests are run at every stage.

launch.title: Launch & Support
launch.description: We go live, monitor performance and provide ongoing support. We stay by your side well after launch.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions on your mind.

delivery.question: How long does delivery take?
delivery.answer: E-commerce projects typically take 4-10 weeks depending on scope. After the discovery call, we provide a custom timeline specific to your project.

pricing.question: How is pricing determined?
pricing.answer: Pricing is based on project scope, feature list and integration requirements. We provide a clear proposal after a free discovery call.

revisions.question: How many revisions do I get?
revisions.answer: We offer unlimited revisions during the design phase. Once development begins, changes are handled within the agreed scope.

maintenance.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
maintenance.answer: Yes. We offer 3 months of free technical support after launch. Afterwards, you can choose one of our monthly maintenance packages.

migration.question: Can you migrate our existing site?
migration.answer: Yes, we migrate your existing site, product data, customer information and order history to the new platform without any data loss.

mobile.question: Do you also build mobile apps?
mobile.answer: Yes. We also develop iOS and Android applications that integrate with your e-commerce store. This is offered as a separate service.

project1.title: FashionStore E-Commerce
project1.description: A high-performance fashion e-commerce platform built from scratch with Next.js.

project2.title: TechShop Mobile
project2.description: Shopify-integrated electronics store app developed for iOS and Android.

project3.title: OrganicBasket
project3.description: WooCommerce-based, SEO-focused e-commerce site for organic products.

testimonial3.comment: They don't just act as a software firm — they approach you like a business partner. The solutions they propose genuinely add value.
